keynotes.text: For women: with prolapsus from atony, enervated by indolence and luxury; worn out with hard work, mental or physical; overtaxed muscles burn and ache; so tired cannot sleep. Always better when occupied, when not thinking of the ailment (Cal. p., Oxal. ac.). Restless, must be continually moving about. Irritable, fault finding; cannot endure least contradiction or receive least suggestion (Anac.). Profound melancholy; deep, mental depression. Diabetes: first stages; urine profuse, clear saccharine; lips dry, stick together; great thirst; restlessness; emaciation; irritable and melancholy. Albuminuria: acute or chronic; during pregnancy, with great weakness, languor, drowsiness, unusually tired, yet knows no reason. Menses: too early, too profuse, from uterine atony in women enfeebled by loss of blood; when patients lose more blood than is made in intermenstrual period; breasts swollen, nipples painful and tender (Con., Lac c.). Flow passive, dark, clotted, offensive. Sensation of soreness and heaviness in pelvis (Lappa); a consciousness of a womb, feels it move when she moves, it is so sore and tender (Lys.). For the bad effects of abortions and miscarriages.
Relations. - Compare: Aletris, Fer., Lil., Phos. ac. Similar: to, Alet., in debility from prolapsus, protracted illness, defective nutrition.

color="#800000">HELONIAS DIOICA Unicorn-root (HELONIAS - CHAMAELIRIUM) Sensation of weakness, dragging and weight in the sacrum and pelvis, with great languor and prostration, are excellent indications for this remedy. There is a sensitiveness expressed as a consciousness of a womb. Tired, backachy females. The weakness shows itself also in a tendency to prolapse and other malposition of the womb. The menses are often suppressed and the kidneys congested. It seems as if the monthly congestion, instead of venting itself as it should through the uterine vessels, had extended to the kidneys. With it all, there is a profound melancholia. Patient must be doing something to engage the mind. Remember it, for women with prolapsus from atony, enervated by indolence and luxury (better when attention is engaged-hence when the doctor comes), or for those worn out with hard work; tired, strained muscles burn and ache; sleepless. Diabetes mellitus, and insipidus. Constant aching and tenderness over kidneys.
Anæmic women, with prolapsus; worn out with hard work, mental or physical.
Heaviness in pelvic region, languor, pain or burning in back, with continual consciousness of a womb, sore and tender.
Better when mind is off herself.

I have found this remedy of use in a generally debilitated condition of women, with many and various complaints or symptoms in the region of the uterus, for instance: Prolapsus from atony, enervated by indolence and luxury; worn out with hard work, mental or physical; muscles burn and ache; so tired cannot sleep (Dr. H. C. Allen).

There is almost always associated with it a more or less anæmic condition. This. anæmia may seem to be consequent upon too profuse menstruation or flooding, or it may exist entirely independent of any such cause. In these cases I have often found albumen present in the urine, sometimes in large quantities especially in pregnant women, and seen rapid improvement and disappearance of the albumen under the action of this remedy.

The fact that these anæmic and debilitated states are found, both under profuse and scanty discharges of the uterine organs, seems to indicate that the local symptoms are secondary, or a consequence of general debility and impoverished blood. Again, the fact that Helonias cures both conditions equally well seems to corroborate it.

What are the symptoms? The leading symptoms are anæmia, great general weakness and languor, and great lowness of spirits or profound melancholy. This condition of mind is temporarily relieved by diversion. She is always better if she can get her mind off herself; dragging weakness in sacral region; various displacements of womb, but more especially prolapses; pain in the back, with lameness, stiffness and weight, and heat or burning in lumbar region; back feels tired and weak; continual consciousness of a womb, it is so sore and tender (Pirogen -distinct consciousness of a heart). Now this condition and these symptoms are often found at the age of puberty, during pregnancy and after labor, and here Helonias is indeed a blessing. I have found it efficacious in the 2d and the 30th, according to susceptibility of the patient. Helonias deserves a thorough proving in the potencies. Compare with Aletris.

mental_emotional.text: Profound melancholy. Patient is better when kept busy, with mind engaged, when doing something. Irritable; cannot endure the least contradiction

Great weakness of memory. Dull, inactive and gloomy. Restless, wants to be continually moving about. Desire to be let alone ; conversation is unpleasant. Irritable ; cannot endure the least contradiction or receive suggestions in relation to any subject. Fault finding. Always better when doing something, when the mind is engaged. Profound melancholy ; deep, undefined depression of mind. Dizziness ; fretful ; everything turns in a circle : anemia. Pain in head is < by stooping, and attended by increased vertigo.

head.text: Burning sensation on top. Headache, better mental exertion

Fulness and pressure in forehead or vertex ; < or renewed when thinking thereof. Pain in forehead as if a band about an inch wide were drawn across it from temple to temple. Pressing pain in one or both temples (in a small spot) ; "a burning sensation" in top and front of head, > by motion and mental exertion, < when either is desisted from. Pressure from within upwards to vertex, < by looking steadily at any fixed point. Pain in occiput, with pulsative pain in vertex, vertigo, < stooping. Uterine and hysterical headache.

back.text: Pain and weight in back; tired and weak. Aching and burning across the lumbar region; can trace outlines of kidneys by constant burning. Boring pain in lumbar region, extending down legs. Great languor, better exercising

Burning and heat in dorsal region, mostly between lower half of scapulæ, while sitting reading, at night. Pains in back, with lameness, stiffness, and weight. Pains in back, more troublesome during night. Feeling of weight and uneasiness in region of kidneys. Pain in lower part of back, through to uterus ; piercing, drawing. Sharp, spasmodic pain in back running to crest of left ilium. Pain about upper part of sacrum and pelvis ; more severe at night. Back aches across lumbar region ; feels tired and weak ; burning and tired aching in lumbar and sacral region on sitting down. Pains in sacro-lumbar region, with lameness, stiffness. Dragging, aching pains in sacral region attending prolapsus uteri. Aching pain in sacrum, also down into each buttock.

female.text: Dragging in sacral region, with prolapse, especially after a miscarriage. Pruritus vulvæ. Backache after miscarriage (Kali c). Weight and soreness in womb; conscious of womb. Menses too frequent, too profuse. Leucorrhœa. Breasts swollen, nipples painful and tender. Parts hot, red, swollen; burn and itch terribly. Albuminuria during pregnancy. Debility attending the menopause

Loss of sexual desire with or without sterility. Profound melancholy, deep, undefined depression, with a sensation of soreness and weight in womb ; a "consciousness" of a womb. Ovarian pains ; soreness and heaviness in hypogastrium. Dragging weakness in sacral region, with prolapsus ; also at climaxis, with marked debility ; profound mental gloom. Uterine displacement in weak patient ; dyspeptic, lethargic, or indisposed to move about ; aches and feels tired all the time ; uterus sensitive ; feels uterus move when she moves, it is so sore and tender ; miscarries easily ; depressed spirits. Prolapsus, uteri and ulceration of cervix, discharge constant, dark, badly smelling ; flooding on lifting a weight, and on least exertion ; face sallow, having an expression of suffering ; great vaginal irritation ; pain in small of back. Uterus low down, fundus tilted forwards ; finger passes with difficulty between os and rectum. Prolapsus uteri, leucorrhœa ; os protrudes externally. Prolapsus uteri dependent upon want of tonicity. Feeble women, with prolapsus or other displacements ; aqueous, abundant leucorrhœa. Prolapsus uteri with tendency to miscarriage. Pain in lower part of back, through to uterus, piercing, drawing. Great uterine hemorrhage all through proving ; pain in back, through to uterus. Profuse flooding, with serous leucorrhœa, much uterine and ovarian pain ; climaxis. Excessive uterine hemorrhage. Menorrhagia from active congestion. Menorrhagia from ulcerated os or cervix, blood dark and bad smelling, and continuing a long while ; very profuse flow at every period, so that her strength is exhausted, and she suffers from debility ; flow increased by least exertion ; complexion pale, sallow, earthy-looking. Menstrual flow too profuse ; from atony of uterus ; passive flow ; < from slightest motion ; dark colored, coagulated, of bad odor ; face pale ; face earthy color ; feeble from loss of blood. Menses too frequent and profuse in women who are feeble from loss of blood ; flow passive, dark, coagulated, offensive. Frequent and profuse menstruation when patients lose more blood than is made in inter-menstrual period, with pain in back, and frequent palpitation of heart. Atonic and passive menorrhagia. Dysmenorrhœa occurring in delicate women, of lax fibre, or who are chlorotic ; sharp cutting and drawing pains during period, passing from back through uterus ; swelling of mamma, with considerable tenderness of mamma and nipples ; painful soreness over the ovaries. During menses, weakness, weariness, lassitude. Scanty menstrual flow, with heaviness, languor, drowsiness and albuminous urine. General weariness and languor ; gloominess and dulness of mind ; amenorrhœa from general atony and torpid condition of whole body. Amenia, arising from or accompanied by disordered digestive apparatus and anemia. Atrophic ovarian amenorrhœa, with anemia, considerable impairment of digestion and assimilation, sterility, extinguished sexual impulses, little or no pain in uterus or its appendages, except some congestion at menstrual period, with heaviness, fulness and pressure in hypogastrium. Pain in back, with irritation of vagina. Aphthous vaginitis, and erythema of external genitals. Intense pruritus of vulva and vagina, with curdy secretion from vulva. Labia and pudendum hot, red, swollen, burning and itching terribly ; epidermis falls off in thin, transparent exfoliations ; mucous surface of labia red, swollen, covered with a curdy deposit, like aphthæ. Leucorrhœa, with pain in lower part of back ; soreness and tenderness of breasts and nipples, particularly at catamenial period. Leucorrhœa, with atony and anemia. Leucorrhœa in old people, atrophied, cancer cachexia. Breasts swollen, nipples painful and tender, cannot bear least pressure of dress. PREGNANCY. PARTURITION. LACTATION. [24] [Helon.]. Threatened abortion, from atonic conditions ; especially in habitual abortion ; slightest overexertion or irritating emotion tends to cause loss of fetus. Had been flowing for several days ; severe bearing down pains preventing sleep, great pain in small of back ; walking about excites pains. θ Threatened abortion. Useful for many of the consequences of miscarriage. Intense pain in stomach, with burning pains ; vomiting and salivation during pregnancy. Subacute gastritis and vomiting in pregnancy. Albuminuria during pregnancy ; great weakness, drowsiness. Chronic parenchymatous nephritis in connection with pregnancy and symptoms of approaching convulsions. Pruritus vulva during pregnancy. Nipples sensitive, painful, breasts swollen ; cannot bear pressure of ordinary dress.

urinary.text: Albuminous, phosphatic; profuse and clear, saccharine. Diabetes

Burning sensation at kidneys ; can trace their outlines by burning ; at 2.30 P. M., dull heat and pressure in vertex, as if skull were too full. Weariness, languor, weight in region of kidneys ; mind dull, inactive ; afternoon and evening. Pain in kidneys with albuminous urine. Congestion of kidneys with albuminuria from amenorrhœa. Right kidney sensitive. Burning scalding when urinating ; desire frequent and urging. Strangury. Involuntary discharge of urine after bladder seemed to be emptied. Urine : profuse, clear, light colored ; albuminous ; diabetic. Great emaciation and debility ; can walk but a few steps at a time ; complete loss of appetite ; pale, chlorotic skin ; tongue red at tip and edges, white in centre ; headache in occiput in morning ; immediate vomiting of animal food unless some acid was taken with it ; constant aching and extreme tenderness in region of kidneys, especially the right ; aching in region of bladder ; intense cutting, tearing pain in urethra when urinating ; very frequent desire to urinate ; urine limpid when first voided, but depositing after a time, a lead-colored, flocky sediment, adhering to vessel ; the amount of urine reached nearly three quarts a day. Restlessness, constant "fidgety" desire to be doing something, low spirits, burning aching in lumbar spine, frequent profuse urination, urine pale yellow, sp. gr. 1, 013, reaction faintly acid ; must get up several times at night to urinate ; debility, easily fatigued, palpitation from going up stairs ; feels her weakness less when she is at work ; in evening, sensation as if cold wind was blowing up limbs from heel to popliteal space ; appetite poor ; bowels relaxed ; sleep difficult and unrefreshing. θ Ante-desquamative stage of Bright's disease. Pain in region of kidneys ; painful stiffness of back ; burning, scalding pain when urinating ; frequent and urgent desire to urinate, with emission of large quantities of red urine ; complete impotence. Scanty menstruation, heaviness, languor, drowsiness, albuminous urine. θ Albuminuria. Chronic albuminuria. First stage of diabetes insipidus and nervosus of women, with congestion of lower third of medulla spinalis. Dull, gloomy and irritable ; melancholy ; complete impotence ; pain and lame feeling in back ; numbness in feet, going off by motion. θ Diabetes. Lips stick together ; thirst ; restlessness ; emaciation ; urine profuse, clear ; linen coming in contact with urine becomes stiff ; large quantities of sugar in urine. Saccharine diabetes.

extremities.text: Sensation as if a cool wind streamed up calves of legs. Feet feel numb when sitting
Severe pains in right hip-joint, < during motion. Numbness in feet, going off by motion, only felt when sitting still.

face.text: Expression of suffering. Pale, earthy face. Face swollen.

mouth_throat.text: Bitter, disagreeable taste, every morning, 5 A. M., on awaking ; lips, tongue and fauces dry. Tongue white. θ Diabetes. Tongue red at tip and borders, white in centre. Salivation of pregnant women and teething children. Mouth gets sore ; stomatitis materna.

stomach_abdomen.text: APPETITE, THIRST. DESIRES, AVERSIONS. [14] [Helon.]. Loss of appetite, eructations, fulness, cramp, and painful congestion of stomach. Appetite poor, food tasteless ; "bilious ;" sleepy during day. Empty eructations. Tasteless eructations and flatulence, causing nausea. Nausea at supper. Vomiting of food. θ Dropsy. Obstinate vomiting in Bright's disease. Constricting, pressing pain in stomach. Cramp-like pain in stomach. Burning in stomach ; burning and aching in spine ; eructations. Irritable stomach, with general dropsy. Idiopathic diseases of stomach, or sympathetic gastric disorders which accompany uterine and renal diseases ; loss of appetite, eructations, fulness, cramp and painful congestion, with depression of spirits. Pain in left side, as if in spleen, which feels as if distended, causing a dull ache. Motion and rumbling in abdomen, as if diarrhœa would come on ; cramps in stomach. Colic-like pains in hypogastric region, off and on all day. Burning in lower third of abdomen.

stool_rectum.text: Stool : loose ; yellow in morning, lumps of feces in evening.

male.text: Sexual desire and power increased. Unusually strong and frequent erections at night. Impotence, complete or partial.

chest_heart.text: Palpitation. Chest sensitive to air. Aching as if front of chest had been compressed in a vice.

generalities.text: Tired, weary, drowsy. General feeling of malaise. Languor, unusually tired, yet knows no reason. Great weariness, with copious acid urination. Sense of profound debility is lost upon exercising. Profound debility, as after severe acute diseases. Debility after diphtheria. Every morning, 5 A. M. : bitter taste. Right : severe pains in hip-joint. Left : pain in side ; sharp, spasmodic pain in back running to crest of ilium. From within upwards : pressure into vertex. As if band about an inch wide were drawn across from temple to temple ; spleen as if distended ; as if diarrhœa would come on ; as if skull was too full ; as if cold wind was blowing up limbs from heel to popliteal space ; as if front of chest had been compressed in a vice. Pain : in head ; in occiput ; in left side ; in kidneys ; in back ; in ovaries ; in small of back ; in lower part of back ; about upper part of sacrum and pelvis. Intense pain : in stomach. Severe pains : in right hip-joint. Piercing, tearing pain : in back. Intense cutting, tearing pain : in urethra when urinating. Sharp cutting and drawing pains ; during menstrual period. Sharp spasmodic pain : in back, running to crest of left ilium. Colic-like pain : in hypogastric region. Cramp : of stomach. Bearing down pains : in abdomen. Burning, scalding : when urinating. Painful soreness : over ovaries. Pressing pain : in one or both temples ; in stomach. Pulsative pain : in vertex. Painful congestion : of stomach. Constricting pain : in stomach. Soreness : in womb ; in hypogastrium ; over ovaries. Irritation : of vagina. Burning : in top and front of head ; in kidneys, can trace their outlines by burning ; in dorsal region ; in stomach ; in spine ; in lower third of abdomen ; labia and pudendum. Burning aching : in lumbar spine. Aching : in spine ; in kidneys ; in region of bladder ; in chest ; in sacrum also down into each buttock. Dull ache : in spleen. Painful stiffness : of back. Pressure : in hypogastrium. Dragging weakness : in sacral region. Lameness : of back. Fulness : in forehead ; in vertex ; of stomach ; in hypogastrium. Numbness : in feet. Pressure : in forehead ; in vertex. Heaviness : in hypogastrium. Weight : in region of kidneys ; in womb. Terrible itching : in labia and pudendum. Chlorosis. Anemia, atony, from prolonged hemorrhage. Dropsy from albuminuria, general debility, uterine atony or after uterine hemorrhage. Rheumatism. TOUCH. PASSIVE MOTION. INJURIES. [45] [Helon.]. Cannot bear least pressure of dress. Extreme tenderness : of kidneys ; mamma and nipples. Sensitiveness : of uterus. Consciousness of a womb : feels it move when she moves. Women : with prolapsus from atony, enervated by indolence and luxury, > when attention is engaged, hence when doctor comes ; worn out with hard work, do not care for sleep, so tired, and strained muscles burn and ache so. Climaxis. Girl, æt. 15 ; albuminuria. Young woman, after getting feel wet ; threatened abortion. Man, previously in good health, ill six weeks ; disease of kidneys. Man, æt. 50, troubled occasionally for several years ; affection of kidneys. Woman, æt. 65 ; diabetes mellitus.

fever_chill.text: Chill, seemingly radiating from solar plexus all over body ; caused by motion of arms. Flushes of heat pass over him on every movement while in a room.

skin.text: Paleness and icteric color of skin. Jaundice.

_raw: It antidotes : Kali brom. (mental depression) ; Lil. tig. (prolapsus uteri)
Compare : Aletris, Ferrum, Phos. ac., Senec., Stannum
